---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with the cluster manager
title: "[bug] "
labels: ["bug", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14.5, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Docker version: `docker --version`
- Project version: `cat VERSION` or tag name
- OpenClaw image tag: [e.g. `latest`, `0.42.0`]

## What happened

A clear and concise description.

## Reproduction steps

1. `./openclaw-cluster.sh init 2`
2. `./openclaw-cluster.sh start all`
3. ...

## Expected behavior

What you expected to see.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened (include logs: `./openclaw-cluster.sh logs 1`).

## Screenshots / logs

If applicable, attach terminal output as a code block.
